name: Layered Tortilla Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup kidney beans, cooked, drained and rinsed
1 cup great northern beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water, onion, garlic, and celery in a microwave-safe casserole dish.
2. Microwave uncovered on high for 5 minutes or until onions and celery are tender.
3. Add chili powder, cayenne pepper, corn, beans, and tomato sauce to the casserole.
4. Place 3 nonfat corn tortillas at the bottom of a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole dish.
5. Top with half of the tomato-bean mixture.
6. Spread 1/2 cup of cottage cheese over the tomato-bean mixture.
7. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup of shredded cheddar cheese.
8. Repeat layers.
9. Microwave uncovered on high for 12 minutes or until cheese has melted and ingredients are warmed through.
10. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
